title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 20 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 20 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 20 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 20/11/2023
DCE iron ore futures rose today by 0.47%. the main contract I2401 closed 968. Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchasing enthusiasm is not high.
